raw_consumer_statement:
During XXXX I made a reservation at what was initially advertised as a hotel then once reservation submitted, hotel became XXXX. I immediately canceled reservation. XXXX XXXX ( the XXXX  ) appealed and Citi Bank ( Citi ) reversed the charges and credited my account. Then, XXXX XXXX submitted an absolutely fraudulent 2nd bill that I stayed at their XXXX  on dates I was NOT in XXXX. I have been diligently and aggressively interacting with Citi inclusive of monthly calls, sending them screen shots of information Citi has requested. And, I have offered multiple times to send them screen shot of my passport with visa data, as well as making transactions on my Citi credit card when I was in XXXX. Citi has listened and blown me off. Most recently, on XXXX, fraud supervisor told me she would work this problem out and get back to me in no later than 2 days. She never got back with me. 
And yes, I have kept meticulous records. As of today, XXXX, I have been told by another fraud supervisor that the case is closed b/c too much time has transpired. Point in fact, Citi has delayed taking appropriate action and is presently invoking bureaucratic jargon and procedures to NOT return/credit my money. As I submitted ALL the information Citi required this was the most basic of claims to resolve. XXXX XXXX most clearly perpetrated a fraudulent transaction against me via Citi and Citi was negligent in allowing this occur. Citi is responsible for protecting fraud against their card holders. It is abjectly clear, Citi failed in my case.
